       wxht.customer,
       wxht.dateis,

       wxht.khpd,
       wxht.mldx,

       o.xdsl4,

       wxhtsheet.wxwyzd
FROM wxht,wxhtsheet 
LEFT 
JOIN (
SELECT sum(cgjhsheet.yxdsl) as xdsl3,sum(cgjhsheet.xdxs) as xdxs3,cgjhsheet.wxwyzd 
FROM cgjhsheet 
GROUP BY cgjhsheet.wxwyzd) AS p 
  ON wxhtsheet.wxwyzd=p.wxwyzd 
LEFT 
JOIN (
SELECT sum(cgjhsheet3.yxdsl) as xdsl4,sum(cgjhsheet3.xdxs) as xdxs4,cgjhsheet3.wxwyzd 
FROM cgjhsheet3 
GROUP BY cgjhsheet3.wxwyzd) AS o 
  ON wxhtsheet.wxwyzd=o.wxwyzd 
WHERE (wxht.rid=wxhtsheet.pid) 
  AND (replace(LEFT(wxhtsheet.bjpath, CHAR_LENGTH(wxhtsheet.bjpath) - 1),'\\','_') like replace(:_user_org_path_,'\\','_') or replace(wxhtsheet.bjpath,'\\','_') LIKE replace(:_user_org_path_,'\\','_'))
  AND (wxhtsheet.sl5>0) 
  AND (wxht.order_id=[采购计划.外销合同]) 
  AND (wxht.wxsh<>"123") 
  AND (wxht.jdrq<>"1999-01-01")

JOIN (
SELECT sum(cgjhsheet.yxdsl) as xdsl3,sum(cgjhsheet.xdxs) as xdxs3,cgjhsheet.wxwyzd 
FROM cgjhsheet 
GROUP BY cgjhsheet.wxwyzd) AS p 
  ON wxhtsheet.wxwyzd=p.wxwyzd 
LEFT 
JOIN (
SELECT sum(cgjhsheet3.yxdsl) as xdsl4,sum(cgjhsheet3.xdxs) as xdxs4,cgjhsheet3.wxwyzd 
FROM cgjhsheet3 
GROUP BY cgjhsheet3.wxwyzd) AS o 
  ON wxhtsheet.wxwyzd=o.wxwyzd

  AND (replace(LEFT(wxhtsheet.bjpath, CHAR_LENGTH(wxhtsheet.bjpath) - 1),'\\','_') like replace(:_user_org_path_,'\\','_') or replace(wxhtsheet.bjpath,'\\','_') LIKE replace(:_user_org_path_,'\\','_'))
